/usr/bin/clang++ -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/MyRacingGame.dir/src/collisionManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MyRacingGame.dir/src/engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MyRacingGame.dir/src/errorLoger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MyRacingGame.dir/src/gameObject.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MyRacingGame.dir/src/inputManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MyRacingGame.dir/src/lapTimer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MyRacingGame.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MyRacingGame.dir/src/menu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MyRacingGame.dir/src/textureManager.cpp.o -o MyRacingGame  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/libSDL3_image.0.4.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libSDL3.0.dylib -framework CoreFoundation -framework Security /opt/homebrew/lib/libbrotlicommon.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libbrotlienc.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libbrotlidec.dylib /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libz.tbd /opt/homebrew/lib/libssl.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libcrypto.dylib
